content.text:
Based on my examination of the molecule, I can now identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 9 (Sulfur).

## Results

**Atom 9 (S - Sulfur)** has the following neighbor atoms:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 5 | C (Carbon) |
| 10 | O (Oxygen) |
| 11 | O (Oxygen) |
| 12 | N (Nitrogen) |

**geomconf_index: 3610**

The sulfur atom (S:9) shown in yellow is covalently bonded to:
- Two oxygen atoms (O:10 and O:11)
- One nitrogen atom (N:12)
- One carbon atom (C:5)

This forms a sulfonamide-like functional group in the molecular structure.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be S. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
